---
title: "P2.03 — Unusual inorganic synthesis (placeholder)"
problem-id: 3
status: tbc
difficulty: 5
topics: [inorganic, synthesis]
date: "2026-05-18"
description: "Placeholder. Original has a TBC flag — a step needs to be confirmed."
---

::: {.callout-important appearance="simple"}
**Status: TBC** — a derivation step is contested and waiting for verification. See the marked step inline once migrated.
:::

> Body to be migrated from `PART2_split/Problem_03_Unusual_inorganic_synthesis - with Key and Analysis - TBC.md`.
